name: MoneyGram
description_short: Atlanta's MoneyGram at 4620 provides check cashing, money transfers, and bill payments with extended hours in GA.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 4620 in Atlanta, GA is a standalone check-cashing location offering extended hours Monday through Saturday from 10 AM to 9 PM, and Sunday until 8 PM. The Atlanta store serves the community with convenient access for residents and visitors needing financial services.

This Atlanta location offers check cashing, domestic and international money transfers, bill payment services, and prepaid card options. For details about current rates and services, call +1 404-753-5055 before your visit.

If you're in Atlanta and need quick check cashing or fast money transfer services, bring a valid government ID and any checks or transfer documents. MoneyGram provides reliable service for urgent financial needs.
address: 4620, 2132 Campbellton Rd SW suite E, Atlanta, GA 30311

company_info.headquarters: 4620, 2132 Campbellton Rd SW suite E, Atlanta, GA 30311

pros: 42+ locations across Atlanta through established partner retailers (CVS, Walmart, Ace Cash Express)
Extended operating hours at many locations, with some open until 11:00 PM
Both online and in-person transfer options available
Easy-to-use location finder tool searchable by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Operates through trusted retail partners, adding convenience to routine shopping
Centralized customer service line available at (800) 746-7287
cons: Service fees and exchange rates not disclosed on website; customers must contact locations for pricing
Dependent on third-party partner hours and availability—service not available 24/7 at all locations
Limited transparency about transfer speed and delivery methods on the location-finder page
No direct customer service at MoneyGram locations; all locations are franchises or partner businesses
Geographic coverage varies significantly by area—rural locations may have minimal availability
best_for: Consumers in urban/suburban areas like Atlanta seeking convenient in-person money transfers
Customers who want to combine money transfer services with routine retail shopping
People sending money domestically or internationally who prefer established retail partnerships
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for Atlanta-area consumers seeking convenient in-person or online money transfers through familiar retail partners. The primary caveat is that the service operates entirely through third-party franchises with variable hours and fee structures that must be confirmed directly with each location.
services: Location finder tool (address, city, state, ZIP search)
Partner retail location access (CVS, Walmart, Ace Cash Express, independent check-cashers)
meta_description: MoneyGram at 4620, Atlanta, GA. Fast check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services.
